events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Given the submittal is missing the equipment listing page and project note needed to confirm whether the proposed ampacity-column shortcut is actually permitted under NEC 110.14(C)/310.15, the correct disposition is `needs_more_info` (medium risk) — with a recommendation to default to the conservative 60°C/75°C column and halt final sizing until the missing documentation is produced.
